name: rootlens-analysis-ia-refactor
title: RootLens Analysis IA refactor
description: Refactor RootLens into a system-like information architecture with router-backed Home, Analysis, KG Studio, and Experiments modules plus timeline-driven analysis detail.
creator: elebirds
notes: Implemented route-backed RootLens IA with Home, Analysis, KG Studio, and Experiments modules. Analysis now has Live, History, and timeline-driven Detail routes. Verified frontend build, smoke, pytest, ruff, mypy, examples, browser routes, and diff hygiene.
